name: Coach Club
about: Coach Club is a modern golf simulator venue designed for year-round game improvement and social play. It combines technology with community, featuring TrackMan simulators, extensive coaching programs, and a private clubhouse atmosphere. The facility offers memberships, leagues, tournaments, and events, supported by a team of PGA professionals including the 2022 New England PGA Teacher of the Year, Rico Riciputi. With locations in North Hampton, NH and Newburyport, MA, it provides an environment for golfers to practice, play, and connect.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology provides real-time data for game improvement
PGA-certified coaching from award-winning instructors like Rico Riciputi
Community-focused atmosphere with leagues, tournaments, and member events

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol service on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Level 1 certified, combines two radars and one camera for precise tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify club rental options, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There's no mention of BYOB policies or food restrictions, but it's best to check directly with the venue for their specific policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but typical simulator play times range from 1-2 hours depending on pace and number of players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers family memberships and hosts junior programs, indicating it welcomes younger golfers.
